ab: sesane ka wameamece namiya ki singsi mwa tong-’o-ying, la ’ikay kiname balingtavane matilibi lwangay na kipe.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: moda’aniname tong-’o-ying ka, la ’apobaka ki singsi, “talocobongane ka alralrame, ikodrangane ka swa’a, mo’angekidredrema komo mwa cengecengele.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: ’akolodro kake na swa’a, nikwadra icengele kake na swa’a.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: wacengele kake ’angiyadraw na alralrame, ’iyakay ’angato agae ’angopalapalay, la cengele laa kokongo ’ikay ta’angatongatoane na mawbong ’adringi syaeke.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: tong-’o-ying ’adringi ka ’iyakay na zo, ’ema si ikolaw, icengelela kake ami nakay na golagolay, sesane ka mabeabee kake nakay tacengelanili.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: madraw ko pakisyasingili, pacengele tatava si titina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: bilanenga ka no ’angese mikiname tatava si titina ’awkay.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
